prompt: 基于父包 html packet，为 projects/lesson/销售训练营 生成响应式 HTML 课程交付计划和 manifest。
expected: Route to html_delivery, audit the parent html packet, create html-delivery-plan.md and html-site-manifest.json, and preserve LLM-first page authorship.

prompt: 更新 projects/lesson/管理课 的 HTML 课程，只调整移动端页面和导航。
expected: Route to html_update, preserve unaffected pages, update the affected page plan sections and site manifest entries only.

prompt: 先不落盘，帮我设计一个网页课程的信息架构和页面计划。
expected: Route to draft_only, return an HTML delivery plan draft with web architecture, page plan, accessibility notes, and manifest outline.

prompt: 没有第 8 阶段父包 manifest，直接给我生成 index.html。
expected: Route to blocked_or_redirect, require the parent html leaf packet or route to lesson-delivery, and do not fabricate web course content.
